name: GOLFTEC Allen
about: GOLFTEC Allen is a golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed cameras, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing analysis and feedback. Services include personalized golf lessons, club fitting with shaft optimization, and practice memberships. The center is designed for golfers seeking a structured improvement approach with expert coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology
Personalized improvement plans based on data-driven feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor used for swing analysis and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for personalized fitting and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted. The facility focuses on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulator session typically takes 2-3 hours depending on player pace and group size.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate instruction.
